content: Backend: Add endpoints for customer history, item sales history, and enhanced bill listing
Frontend: Build Customer List + Customer History page (admin - full bill history, modify/delete)
Frontend: Build All Bills page for admin (chronological, full details, modify/delete)
Frontend: Build Item Sales History page (per-item sales details)
Frontend: Update Manager Dashboard with simplified customer visit summary (items, rates, making, carat rates - no amounts)
Update navigation/routing in App.js and AdminDashboard sidebar
